description: Golden vectors for AgentMark trace grouping. The friendly grouping API (sessionId/userId/sessionName/traceName/tags/metadata) maps to these exact OpenTelemetry span attributes, which the normalizer promotes to session/user/metadata for any span scope. @agentmark-ai/otel (TypeScript) and agentmark-sdk (Python) must both produce this mapping so grouping stays identical across languages. All values are strings; tags and object metadata use COMPACT JSON (no spaces) — JS JSON.stringify, Python json.dumps(separators=(',', ':')). Null/undefined fields are omitted.

cases.name: object metadata values use compact JSON
null fields and null metadata values are omitted
